$comment: Tooling-audit roadmap. INTENT + PREDICATES only, never hand-written status. Compute status: npm run flowmap:roadmap -- --roadmap docs/flowmap/audit/audit-roadmap.json. Instructions per phase: docs/flowmap/audit/WORK_ORDER.md (intent-only doc; auditable via roadmap.mjs --audit-doc).
spine: inventory -> classify -> attack -> test-audit -> findings -> fixes

items.title: Guarantee inventory
items.intent: Enumerate every guarantee the tooling claims (gate/prove/enforce language in CLAUDE.md, tool headers, echo strings) into a claim|mechanism|file table. Scope: tools/**/*.mjs, .claude hooks, workflows, npm scripts.

items.title: Claim classification
items.intent: Classify every inventoried claim as GATE (machine-blocked), CONVENTION (script exists, nothing forces it), or PROSE (words only). Per GATE: exact trigger + bypass surface.

items.title: Adversarial pressure test
items.intent: Attempt to break every GATE. Each finding entry must carry `repro:` command + observed result. Minimum attack surface: contract-gate fail-open paths (malformed stdin, sentinel typo, sentinel absent, ungated main-agent Edit/Write); hook firing in worktrees/resume/headless/subagent sessions; stale-map commits pre-CI; .quiz-answers.json replay/edit/staleness; CI vs local script diff + branch protection; hollow-file satisfaction of roadmap predicates; handoff-fresh freshness definition gameability; hook behaviour on crashed sessions.

checks.note: Human confirms attack list coverage is complete, not sampled.

items.title: Test-suite deny-path audit
items.intent: Per gate script: does its test exercise the DENY path or only ALLOW? Mutation spot-check: break 3 predicates deliberately, run spec:test:all, record surviving mutations.

items.title: Findings register
items.intent: Consolidated register: id | severity (keystone-bypass / gap / hygiene) | claim broken | repro | proposed fix | fix cost. Source of truth for AUD5 fix plans.

items.title: Fixes shipped via standard loop
items.intent: One finding per plan/contract. Each fix ships with a test that fails pre-fix, passes post-fix. Verified by flowmap:status on the fix plan(s) + gate green. No fix work before AUD0-AUD4 complete.

checks.note: Register keystones F-01..F-04+F-19 fixed; F-05 (broadened status-marker ban), F-06 (canonical gate list, gate-parity cmd above), F-07 (unfiltered triggers, grep above) and F-08 (tooling-coverage deny fixtures, tooling-map cmd above; CI via spec:test:all) landed. Remaining (04-findings.md): gaps F-09..F-15, hygiene F-16..F-18. Add a cmd check per landed fix; remove this manual note when the register is closed.
